self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can improve future Engine source adaptation quality by making the improvement stage consume the typed extraction and adaptation boundaries produced earlier in the same planning pipeline.
self_improvement.mechanism: This DEEP Architecture case opens one bounded improvement-stage chaining slice in engine/directive-engine.ts rather than a broad redesign of proof or integration planning.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP opener, extraction fed adaptation directly, but improvement, proof, and integration still consumed only planningInput.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The second chained seam will make progressive planning deeper in Engine code while preserving a clear stop-line before proof or integration chaining.

decision.rationale: The prior DEEP slice and current Engine code justify one separate bounded implementation slice for improvement-stage chaining.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
